{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Dornoth heavy shuttle
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The team has a captured [[Dornoth heavy shuttle]] with reinforced armor.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10">''The Engineer'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
